title: Alternative guard placement (on the pack's internal routes)

setup.dev: On — Final toggle off; clone: true added to cloned events
setup.rename: On, at the end of each pipeline
setup.guard: On the dev Pack's internal Routes

description: Guard placed on the dev pack's INTERNAL route filters (sourcetype && clone==true) instead of the eval. All entrants are clones, so behavior should match s3a.
